mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM medicine WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM supplier WHERE status = 1
SELECT IFNULL(SUM( CASE WHEN expiry_date >= CURDATE() THEN (current_quantity - locked_quantity) ELSE 0 END ), 0) FROM inventory
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM warning_record WHERE status = 'OPEN'
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM purchase_order WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM sale_order WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()

SELECT DATE(created_at) AS stat_date, IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS total_amount, COUNT(1) AS order_count FROM purchase_order WHERE DATE(created_at) >= #{startDate} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY stat_date ASC

SELECT DATE(created_at) AS stat_date, IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) AS total_amount, COUNT(1) AS order_count FROM sale_order WHERE DATE(created_at) >= #{startDate} GROUP BY DATE(created_at) ORDER BY stat_date ASC

SELECT mc.id AS category_id, mc.category_name, IFNULL(SUM( CASE WHEN i.expiry_date >= CURDATE() THEN (i.current_quantity - i.locked_quantity) ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS available_quantity, COUNT(DISTINCT i.id) AS batch_count FROM medicine_category mc LEFT JOIN medicine m ON m.category_id = mc.id AND m.status = 1 LEFT JOIN inventory i ON i.medicine_id = m.id GROUP BY mc.id, mc.category_name HAVING available_quantity > 0 OR batch_count > 0 ORDER BY available_quantity DESC, mc.id ASC
SELECT warning_type, COUNT(1) AS total_count FROM warning_record WHERE status = 'OPEN' GROUP BY warning_type ORDER BY total_count DESC, warning_type ASC
